Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IdentityVerificationProcFld

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IdentityVerificationProcFld
public class IdentityVerificationProcFld extends Metadata

Java class for IdentityVerificationProcFld complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IdentityVerificationProcFld">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="customFieldLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataSourceType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}IdentityVerificationProcFldDataSourceType"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fieldDataType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}IdentityVerificationProcFldFieldDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fieldType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}IdentityVerificationProcFldFieldType"/>
         <element name="fieldValueFormula" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isManualInput" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sequenceNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
